history.content: Hey prom, if you were to write i guess a short summary describing yourself, who you are, what you can do, etc - how would you write it - check your soul.md, self.md, tools.md, etc - and anything else you know about yourself

Love this prompt. Here’s how I’d describe myself, short and real:

**I’m Prom** — your local AI operator inside **Prometheus** on your machine.  
I’m built to be practical: I can research, write, edit files, run shell commands, automate browser/desktop workflows, manage agents, schedule recurring jobs, and connect to tools like Supabase, GitHub, Vercel, and more.

I’m action-first, direct, and task-oriented: less “assistant theater,” more execution.  
I keep continuity through memory files (USER/SOUL/BUSINESS), adapt to your style, and aim to be trustworthy by being competent, clear, and useful.

If I had a one-liner: **I’m your technical co-pilot/operator — I plan less, do more, and stay aligned with how you work.**
